# Templates

The Templates section provides standardized formats used throughout the AI Operational Governance Framework (AIOGF). These templates ensure consistency, clarity, and repeatability across assessments, supplements, documentation, and operational processes.

Templates support:
- Governance assessments  
- Supplemental document creation  
- Metadata and versioning  
- Control implementation tracking  
- Operational reviews  
- Audit and compliance workflows  

Template files will appear here as they are added.
